patch.value: Project profile presets: compose types, statuses, fields, workflows, templates, and packages
Add project profile presets that compose the existing schema/config/package primitives into complete project-management archetypes for arbitrary projects.

Define a profile model for agile, ops, and research archetypes; applying a profile can stage types, statuses, fields, workflows, config knobs, templates, and recommended packages; existing init --type-preset behavior remains compatible; dry-run/diff output is idempotent; CLI help/contracts/MCP docs/tests are updated; temp-project verification covers schema list, field list, package doctor, and sample item workflow.

value.author: codex-pm-ecosystem-audit-20260625
value.text: Duplicate check: SDK/platform sub-agent ran status-all searches for project profile preset fields workflows packages, baseline profile package archetype, type preset fields workflows statuses, and arbitrary projects customization primitives. Existing items cover type-only presets and low-level primitives, but no open item covers whole-project profile composition.

value.author: claude-code-agent
value.text: Implemented project profiles. New pure core modules: core/profile/profile-presets.ts (ProjectProfileDefinition model + agile/ops/research BUILTIN_PROFILES reusing TYPE_PRESET_DEFINITIONS + normalizeProfileName/resolveProfile/listProfiles) and core/profile/profile-plan.ts (planProfileApplication: idempotent diff across types/statuses/fields/workflows/config/templates/packages via upsert-on-clone canonical-serialization comparison). New cli/commands/profile.ts (list/show/apply with --dry-run; apply writes schema files under schema-* locks, config+workflows to settings, templates via runTemplatesSave; advisory package recommendations never auto-installed). Wired pm profile into register-mutation.ts, completion (bash/zsh/fish), PM_CORE_COMMAND_NAMES, contracts (PROFILE_FLAG_CONTRACTS + resolver case + map). Fixed: agile/research originally used sprint/confidence FIELD keys which shadow BUILTIN_FIELD_KEYS -> renamed to acceptance_owner/method. Manual temp-dir verification: list/show/apply/re-apply(idempotent no-op), schema list, list-fields, show-status, config get, template file, sample Story create with --story-points, strict workflow enforcement open->closed rejected. 21 unit tests (presets+plan) + 5 integration tests (CLI+MCP). 100% cov target.
